parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  source: $json.source,
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  contact_name: $json.contact_name,
  email: $json.email,
  phone: $json.phone,
  website: $json.website,
  category: $json.category,
  region: $json.region,
  country: $json.country,
  lead_type: $json.lead_type,
  segment: $json.segment,
  score: $json.score,
  raw_data: $json.raw_data
}) }}
